articles.title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
articles.description: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.

articles.title: Vic Falls allure spawns tourist rush
articles.description: Rutendo Nyeve-Bulawayo Bureau A RECORD number of local and international tourists are visiting the Victoria Falls as the waterfall reaches its peak, defying fears that numbers could drop due to... The post Vic Falls allure spawns tourist rush appeared first on herald .

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: NATO at breaking point: Transatlantic rupture accelerates under US escalation
more.description: The war in Iran and US President Donald Trump’s renewed push to annex Greenland have triggered what may be the deepest fracture in the 77-year history of the NATO alliance. By early April 2026, relations between the US and its European allies appear to have reached a breaking point, with European leaders openly discussing “Plan […]The post NATO at breaking point: Transatlantic rupture accelerates under US escalation appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln spotted 200 km away from Iran
more.description: LONDON,- US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln has entered the Gulf of Oman and is now approximately 200 km to the south of Iran’s coast, BBC reported, citing satellite data. According to BBC, it was the closest approach to Iran by a US vessel since the start of the US attack on Iran. The carrier […]The post US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln spotted 200 km away from Iran appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: VFEX market capitalisation hits US$3.85bn
more.description: Surging demand for United States dollar-denominated assets has pushed the Victoria Falls Stock Exchange (VFEX) to a market capitalisation of US$3.85 billion, driven by sharp price gains, major listings and a continued shift in investor preference away from the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange (ZSE). According to stockbrokers IH Securities’ March 2026 Monthly Snapshot, VFEX recorded an […]The post VFEX market capitalisation hits US$3.85bn appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: UK-based director in US$22k Mazoe orange crush theft
more.description: A 33-year-old company director has appeared in court facing theft charges after allegedly orchestrating a scheme that prejudiced Schweppes Zimbabwe of more than US$22 000 worth of Mazoe Orange Crush. The accused, Tatenda Masawi, appeared before Harare magistrate Ruth Moyo over the weekend and was not asked to plead. The complainant is Schweppes Zimbabwe, represented […]The post UK-based director in US$22k Mazoe orange crush theft appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Zim should seek new tobacco markets to absorb output surge
more.description: Zimbabwe needs to aggressively seek new tobacco export markets to maintain firm domestic prices, as traditional buyers can no longer absorb the country’s high output volumes, the Parliamentary Portfolio Committee on Lands, Agriculture, Fisheries, Water and Rural Development has said. The parliamentary committee, chaired by Chivi South legislator Felix Saul Maburutse, has undertaken fact-finding visits […]The post Zim should seek new tobacco markets to absorb output surge appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: World Bank notes signs of stability, potential in Zimbabwe despite regional headwinds
more.description: Zimbabwe has recorded a positive fiscal balance and is showing early signs of macroeconomic stabilisation, according to the World Bank’s Spring 2026 Africa Economic Update, even as much of the region struggles with rising debt and energy shocks.Zimbabwe trade fair The report, Making Industrial Policy Work in Africa, highlights that Zimbabwe is one of a […]The post World Bank notes signs of stability, potential in Zimbabwe despite regional headwinds appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: US$500m coal-to-fertiliser power move to end imports
more.description: The Government is facilitating new investments in the country’s fertiliser value chain, with plans afoot to inject US$500 million into coal-to-fertiliser production to bolster domestic supply and insulate the country against external shocks. According to the Ministry of Industry and Commerce, representatives from Chinese firms Sunny Yi Feng and Wintrue Holdings recently met with the […]The post US$500m coal-to-fertiliser power move to end imports appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: ‘Tight liquidity to anchor ZiG stability beyond 2026’
more.description: THE ZiG exchange rate is likely to remain stable beyond 2026, supported by tight liquidity conditions and restrained money supply growth, thinktank Africa Economic Development Strategies says . Speaking at a dialogue on geopolitical risks posed by the US-Israeli war against Iran, AEDS executive director Professor Gift Mugano said tight ZiG liquidity has curtailed speculative […]The post ‘Tight liquidity to anchor ZiG stability beyond 2026’ appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Charamba Defends Constitutional Amendment, Dismisses Criticism as Disinformation
more.description: HARARE – Presidential spokesperson George Charamba has mounted a vigorous defence of the proposed Constitutional Amendment No. 3 Bill, dismissing criticism from opposition groups and sections of civil society as “gratuitous disinformation” and insisting the reform process is both lawful and routine. Speaking in a wide-ranging interview, Charamba—who serves as Deputy Chief Secretary for Presidential […]The post Charamba Defends Constitutional Amendment, Dismisses Criticism as Disinformation appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Zimbabwe Recalls Azithromycin Batch Over Quality Defect, Raising Effectiveness Concerns
more.description: Harare – Zimbabwe’s medicines regulator has ordered the urgent recall of a widely used antibiotic after quality concerns were identified during routine testing, raising alarms over its effectiveness and implications for patient care. The Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe (MCAZ) confirmed that Azithromycin 500mg USP Tablets, Batch Number 24050191, are being withdrawn from circulation after […]The post Zimbabwe Recalls Azithromycin Batch Over Quality Defect, Raising Effectiveness Concerns appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Liquid C2 launches Africa’s first Google partner experience centre
more.description: Liquid C2, a business of Cassava Technologies, has launched Africa’s first Partner Experience Centre powered by Google Cloud in Johannesburg, marking a significant step in the continent’s push toward advanced cloud and artificial intelligence adoption. The facility is designed to move partners and resellers beyond traditional distribution models by offering an immersive environment where they […]The post Liquid C2 launches Africa’s first Google partner experience centre appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Chiwenga Ups the Ante on Mnangagwa’s 2030 Constitutional Plan
more.description: HARARE – Vice-President Constantino Chiwenga has reportedly stepped up efforts to counter President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s proposed constitutional amendments, framing the debate around the core principles of Zimbabwe’s liberation struggle—land ownership and the “one-man, one-vote” doctrine. The developments come amid an escalating succession struggle between the two leaders, with the proposed extension of presidential tenure to […]The post Chiwenga Ups the Ante on Mnangagwa’s 2030 Constitutional Plan appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Chivayo rewards lawyers after custody ‘victory’
more.description: Businessman Wicknell Chivayo says he has rewarded his legal team with luxury vehicles and cash bonuses following a High Court ruling that granted him access to his children after a protracted divorce battle. Chivayo revealed that each member of his legal team received a brand-new Range Rover Sport valued at approximately US$250,000, along with cash […]The post Chivayo rewards lawyers after custody ‘victory’ appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Offset makes shocking entry to stage after scary casino shooting
more.description: Offset is already back on stage just days after being shot in Florida. The rapper made his return over the weekend during a performance at the University of Arkansas’s Rowfest on April 11, where he was initially wheeled onto the stage before rising to his feet to cheers from the crowd.  Videos from the night show […]The post Offset makes shocking entry to stage after scary casino shooting appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Constitution Defenders Forum issues 24-hour ultimatum for reinstatement of Majome as Rights Commission chairperson, says ouster unconstitutional
more.description: THE Constitution Defenders Forum (CDF) has condemned the removal of Jessie Majome as chairperson of the Zimbabwe Human Rights Commission, describing the move as unconstitutional and politically motivated. President Emmerson Mnangagwa removed Majome from her position as chairperson of the ZHRC this past weekend, just a few days after she condemned parliamentary public hearings on [...] The post Constitution Defenders Forum issues 24-hour ultimatum for reinstatement of Majome as Rights Commission chairperson, says ouster unconstitutional appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
